---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Which layer does this affect?
- [ ] Layer 1 — Reliability / Observability
- [ ] Layer 2 — Performance / Cost
- [ ] Layer 3 — New Capabilities
- [ ] Layer 4 — Deployment
- [ ] Layer 5 — Evaluation
- [ ] Other / Cross-cutting

## Additional Context
Links to relevant docs, papers, or similar implementations elsewhere.
